title: Coelogyne pandurichila
taxonomy: Coelogyne pandurichila is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This family, commonly known as the orchid family, is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. The genus Coelogyne is a group of terrestrial orchids, native to tropical Asia. They are characterized by their sympodial growth habit and showy, fragrant flowers. Within the genus Coelogyne, C. pandurichila is a species of orchid that is known for its unique characteristics and growth habits.
